title: Vegetables – goodness straight from the ground.

seo.title: Vegetables - goodness straight from the ground. - Marinda Kook

html:
It's not a recipe I'm sharing with you today. It's just a quick side dish that takes very little effort. The biggest job is peeling the vegetables. It always looks lovely on the table.

YOU NEED:

  1. whatever vegetables are available – I used butternut, onions, potatoes and carrots.
  2. a few sprigs of rosemary
  3. salt and pepper
  4. olive oil

NOW:

  • peel your vegetables and cut them into cubes – not too small or fine
  • scatter the rosemary over your vegetables
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • drizzle generously with olive oil
  • bake in the oven uncovered at 190 degrees Celsius for about 40 minutes – test with a fork that everything is soft but not mushy

Enjoy this goodness with a braai or as a side dish with any meal.
